config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

records.output_text: This isn't for everyone – some may have seen this coming though! —but we hope you enjoy our translation with confidence or just feel free to suggest feedback on Reddit here . An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.
